title: cruciata glabra f. hirsutissima
intro: Cruciata glabra f. hirsutissima, also known as hairy sticky weed, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Cruciata glabra f. hirsutissima include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
